title: One Block Challenge
description: A One Block Challenge mod with many features
body:
# 🌍 OneBlock Challenge ![OneBlock Banner](https://i.imgur.com/placeholder-banner.png)
**Start on a single block. Survive. Progress through 15+ unique phases. Conquer the void!** [![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-1.21.4-brightgreen?style=flat&logo=fabricmc)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version-0.3.0--BETA-blue?style=flat)](https://github.com/DerMikiger/OneBlockMod/releases) [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/DerMikiger/OneBlockMod?color=red)](https://github.com/DerMikiger/OneBlockMod/issues)
--- ## 🎯 **What is OneBlock Challenge?** OneBlock Challenge is a **Fabric Skyblock survival mod** where you begin your journey on **one regenerating block** suspended in the void. Break it repeatedly to progress through **15 thematic phases** inspired by Minecraft's diverse biomes and dimensions. Each phase introduces new blocks, valuable resources, challenging mobs, and exciting gameplay mechanics! --- ## ✨ **Core Features** ### 🧱 **The OneBlock System** - 🔄 **Single regenerating block** at a fixed position - ⚡ **Instant regeneration** after every break - 📈 **Progress tracking** from 0 blocks to infinity - 💾 **Automatic saving** per world - 🌍 **Multi-world support** for different challenges ### 📊 **15 Progressive Phases** *Each phase adds new blocks to the pool while keeping previous ones!* | Phase | Unlock At | Theme | ⭐ **Signature Drops** | |:-----:|:---------:|:------|:----------------------| | **1** | **0 blocks** | 🌾 **Plains** | Dirt, Grass Block, Oak Log, Hay Bale, White Wool | | **2** | **50 blocks** | ⛏️ **Underground** | Stone, Coal Ore, **Iron Ore**, Basalt, Andesite | | **3** | **150 blocks** | ❄️ **Winter** | Snow Block, **Diamond Ore**, Packed Ice, Spruce Log | | **4** | **300 blocks** | 🌊 **Ocean** | Sand, Gravel, Prismarine, **Sea Lantern**, Clay | | **5** | **500 blocks** | 🌴 **Jungle** | Jungle Wood, **Melon**, **Emerald Ore**, Cocoa Beans | | **6** | **750 blocks** | 🐸 **Swamp** | Mud, Mangrove Roots, **Slime Block**, Lily Pads | | **7** | **1000 blocks** | 🏰 **Dungeon** | Mossy Stone Bricks, **Chiseled Stone Bricks**, Cobwebs | | **8** | **1300 blocks** | 🏜️ **Desert** | Sandstone, **Cactus**, Terracotta, Dead Bush | | **9** | **1700 blocks** | 🔥 **Nether** | Netherrack, **Quartz Ore**, Magma Block, **Ancient Debris** | | **10** | **2200 blocks** | 🌌 **The End** | **End Stone**, Purpur Block, **Chorus Plant**, **Obsidian** | | **11** | **2800 blocks** | 🌌 **End Advanced** | End Stone Bricks, **End Rod**, **Shulker Box**, Crying Obsidian | | **12** | **3500 blocks** | ☁️ **Sky Islands** | Quartz Block, Smooth Quartz, **Glowstone**, Light Block | | **13** | **4300 blocks** | ⚙️ **Ancient Tech** | **Redstone Block**, Piston, **Observer**, Dispenser | | **14** | **5200 blocks** | 🐉 **Mythic** | **Enchanting Table**, **Beacon**, **Dragon Egg**, Amethyst Block | | **15** | **6200 blocks** | 🌪️ **Chaos** | **Netherite Block**, **Beacon**, **Dragon Egg**, Reinforced Deepslate, **Ancient Debris** | > ⚠️ **Warning:** Phase 15 is designed for extreme endgame worlds. ### 🐮 **Dynamic Mob Spawning** - 🎲 **5% spawn chance** with every block break - 🐄 **60% Passive mobs:** Cow, Pig, Sheep, Chicken, Horse - 👹 **40% Hostile mobs:** Zombie, Skeleton, Drowned, Spider - 📍 Spawns **2-3 blocks** around the OneBlock ### 🎉 **Phase Unlock Celebrations** - 🔊 Satisfying **level-up sound effect** - ✨ **Gold-framed** chat notifications - 📊 **Live block counter** display - 🎨 **Colored phase names** with "Unlocked!" messages ### 🖥️ **Improved HUD** *(NEW in v0.3.0)* - 🎯 **Top-left corner is now completely free** - 🌈 **Better compatibility** with shaders and minimaps - ✨ **Cleaner, less intrusive** gameplay experience ### 💎 **Emerald Shop** *(Phase 5+)* - 💰 **Currency:** Emeralds from your inventory - 🛍️ **Phase-locked exclusive offers:** - **Phase 5:** Diamond Tools, Jungle resources - **Phase 6:** Swamp resources - **Phase 7:** Full Diamond Armor set - **Phase 8:** Desert resources - **Phase 9:** Totems of Undying, Elytra, Beacons --- ## 🎮 **Commands** | Command | Description | Permission | |:--------|:------------|:-----------| | `/oneblock` | 📋 Display mod info & version | All players | | `/oneblockinfo` | 📊 Show current phase, blocks broken, and position | All players | | `/oneblocktarget ` | 📍 Set the OneBlock spawn position | OP only | | `/oneblocksetphase <1-15>` | ⚡ Jump directly to a specific phase | OP only | > 🔄 **Note:** `/oneblockreset` has been removed in v0.3.0. Use `/oneblocksetphase 1` to reset to Phase 1. --- ## 🚀 **Installation & Quick Start** ### **Requirements** - ✅ **Fabric Loader** 1.21.4 (with Loader Version 0.16.9+) - ✅ **Fabric API** 0.113.0+ - ✅ New **Void** or **Superflat** world - ✅ **Cheats enabled** (for setup commands) ### **Getting Started** 1. **Create a Void World** in Minecraft 2. Run `/oneblocktarget X Y Z` (set the OneBlock position) 3. **Break the block** → Watch it regenerate instantly! 4. Use `/oneblockinfo` to track your progress 5. **Survive and thrive** through all 15 phases! --- ## 🏗️ **Development Roadmap** | Version | Planned Features | Status | |:-------:|:-----------------|:-------| | **v0.3.0-BETA** | 5 new endgame phases (11-15), Improved HUD | ✅ **Released!** | | **v0.3.0 Hotfix 1** | Quality-of-life improvements, Bug fixes | ✅ **Released!** | | **v0.3.0 Hotfix 2** | Additional bug fixes, Balance adjustments | 🔜 Coming soon | | **v0.4.0** | **Multi-version support: 26.x & 1.20.1 (Fabric)** | 🎯 Q1 2026 | | **v0.5.0** | Enhanced Shop GUI, Custom world generation | 📅 Q2 2026 | | **v0.6.0** | Quest system, Full polish & optimization | 📅 Q3-Q4 2026 | --- ## 🔧 **Current Status: v0.3.0-HOTFIX 1** **What's New in v0.3.0 HOTFIX 1:** - ✅ Bugs has been fixed - ✅ 1.20.1 is now supported! **Previously Implemented:** - ✅ 15 complete phases with unique themes - ✅ Vanilla-style mob spawning system - ✅ Automatic save/load functionality - ✅ Phase unlock effects & animations - ✅ Full command suite - ✅ Emerald Shop system (Phase 5+) **In Development:** - ⏳ Quality-of-life improvements - ⏳ Multi-version support (26.1.x) - ⏳ Phase-specific mob variations - ⏳ Performance optimizations --- ## 📊 **Version History** | Version | Release Date | Downloads | |:-------:|:------------|:---------:| | **v0.3.0-BETA** | January 2026 | 🆕 Just released! | | **v0.2.0-BETA** | December 2025 | 244+ | --- ## ❤️ **Meet the Developer** **DerMikiger (Mikail)** - *Age 16* A passionate young developer bringing creative survival challenges to Minecraft! *Solo-developed OneBlock experience with passion and long-term vision.*
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Repository-black?style=flat&logo=github)](https://github.com/DerMikiger/OneBlockMod)
---
**⭐ If you enjoy OneBlock Challenge, consider starring the repository!** *Made with 💚 for the Minecraft community* **Beyond the End. Beyond Balance. Into Chaos.**
